query:
SELECT g.item_id, g.name, g.category, g.country, g.organization 
FROM grants g 
WHERE g.name LIKE '~%' 
   OR g.name LIKE '%~%'
   OR g.name REGEXP '^[0-9~. ]+$'
   OR LENGTH(g.name) < 5
ORDER BY g.name
LIMIT 100;
